title: Herding Tigers
author: Todd Henry
subtopics: creative leadership, team management, power, culture
subline: Be the leader that creative people need.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- 3 stylized tiger stripes (angled, varying widths) and three pairs of tiger eyes (small ovals). The eye of the lead tiger is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1600)" fill="none">
    <!-- Three tigers, each a stripe + an eye. Stacked diagonally. -->
    <g>
      <!-- Tiger 1: top right -->
      <path d="M 200 -480 L 520 -240 L 600 -180" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <g transform="translate(620 -160)">
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="20" ry="10" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/>
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="8" ry="8" fill="#4c4c4c"/>
      </g>
      <!-- Tiger 2: middle -->
      <path d="M -240 -260 L 80 -20 L 160 40" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <g transform="translate(180 60)">
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="20" ry="10" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/>
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="8" ry="8" fill="#4c4c4c"/>
      </g>
      <!-- Tiger 3: bottom left RED eye -->
      <path d="M -600 -40 L -320 200 L -240 260" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <g transform="translate(-220 280)">
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="20" ry="10" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="8" ry="8" fill="#fc1c46"/>
      </g>
    </g>
    <!-- A small red herder's whip line going down-left -->
    <line x1="-660" y1="-540" x2="-200" y2="320" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="-680" y="-560" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.2em">LEADER</text>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">THE MOST DIFFICULT LEADERSHIP TASK</text>
</svg>
rationale: Three abstract tigers, each rendered as a single curved stripe (their back/tail) ending in a small eye-ellipse. The bottom-left tiger's eye is red 2px stroke + filled — the wildest, the one the leader most needs to manage. A faint red diagonal line runs from upper-left (labeled 'LEADER') down through the herd. The composition is a literal herding scene without the obvious tiger iconography.
